analysis: v2 successfully got function names and code snippets into findings. But fix patterns are still absent — recommendations are 'Break down into smaller functions' or 'Add comprehensive error handling' with no before/after code. Also zero Critical/High findings despite real production risks (e.g. CLI failures silently resolve to empty string). Model needs a concrete example of what a proper fix pattern looks like.
hypothesis: v3: Add a worked example (one complete finding with function name + snippet + fix pattern) at the top of the output requirements section, so the model can pattern-match on format rather than interpret abstract rules.
